name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0004
purpose: Record the active MixtarRVS kernel/initramfs profile contract without rewriting EFI, bootloader defaults, PID 1, /boot, or rollback profiles.
non_goals: Do not rewrite EFI loader entries.
known_limitations: EFI reports initrd=\EFI\mixtarrvs-rt\initrd.img, but the EFI filesystem was not mounted during audit.
Stage 0004 records the loader path contract but does not claim EFI/bootloader ownership.
Initramfs still needs a Mixtar-owned contract for mounting /dev, /proc, /sys, /run, /tmp, finding /System, exposing staged libraries, and execing fallback init or a Mixtar init shim.
